LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BENJAMIN, WEILL & MAZUR APC MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO COMMENCE ARBITRATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS GRANTED, AND THE ACTION IS ORDERED TO ARBITRATION, WITHIN 90 DAYS OF THE DATE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER IS SERVED. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER THE ACTION FOR THE PURPOSE OF EFFECTUATING THIS ORDER. IT IS ALSO ORDERED THAT OTHER THAN SET FORTH HEREIN, OR AS MAY BE ORDERED BY THE COURT, PROCEEDINGS IN THIS ACTION ARE OTHERWISE STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration , Enforce Arbitration Agreement , And Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BENJAMIN, WEILL & MAZUR APC Motion to Compel Plaintiff to Commence Arbitration. Appearances: Alexander E. Hamilton, Jr. (415) 781-4400 ext 1475, Plaintiff and opposing party appearing in Pro Per; David Benjamin, Esq. of Benjamin, Weill & Mazer, (415) 421-0730 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, and the action is ordered to arbitration, within 90 days of the date notice of entry of this order is served. The Court retains jurisdiction over the action for the purpose of effectuating this Order. It is also ordered that other than set forth herein, or as may be ordered by the court, proceedings in this action are otherwise stayed pending completion of arbitration. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
